title.description: Heading of the NFSC testnet faucet page. NFSC is a brand token name; keep verbatim.

description.description: Subheading explaining the faucet dispenses 20 NFSC test tokens on testnets. Keep the '20$NFSC' token amount verbatim.

chainLabel.description: Field label for the blockchain network selector.

receivingWalletLabel.description: Field label for the wallet that will receive the minted tokens.

walletPlaceholder.description: Placeholder in the receiving-wallet input prompting the user to paste an address or pick a linked wallet.

walletHelpText.description: Helper text under the wallet field clarifying tokens mint to the selected wallet on the Sepolia testnet. Keep 'Sepolia' verbatim.

submitting.description: Button label shown while the faucet request is being submitted.

requestNfsc.description: Primary button to request NFSC tokens. Keep 'NFSC' verbatim.

rateLimitedTitle.description: Status title shown when the user requested tokens too recently and is rate-limited.

rateLimitedDescription.description: Status body telling the user when they can try again. Keep the {time} placeholder verbatim.

rateLimitedFallback.description: Fallback word used in place of a timestamp when the next-eligible time is unknown (e.g. 'Try again after later').

mintInProgressTitle.description: Status title shown while the mint transaction is being confirmed.

mintInProgressDescription.description: Status body shown while waiting for the Sepolia transaction to confirm. Keep 'Sepolia' verbatim.

mintCompleteTitle.description: Status title shown when the token mint has completed successfully.

viewTransaction.description: Link to view the completed transaction on a block explorer.

requestFailedTitle.description: Status title shown when the faucet request failed.
